subject: Math
question: $y=\sqrt{(1-x)(1+x)}$ হলে, $\left(1-x^{2}\right) \frac{d y}{d x}+x y=$
explanation: Solve: এখানে, $y=\sqrt{(1-x)(1+x)}=\sqrt{1-x^{2}}$ উভয় পক্ষকে $x$ -এর সাপেক্ষ অন্তরীকরণ করে পাই, $\begin{aligned} & \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{1}{2 \sqrt{1-x^{2}}}(-2 x)=\frac{-x \sqrt{1-x^{2}}}{1-x^{2}} \\ \Rightarrow & \left(1-\mathrm{x}^{2}\right) \frac{d y}{d x}=-\mathrm{x} \sqrt{1-\mathrm{x}^{2}}=-x y \\ \therefore & \left(1-x^{2}\right) \frac{d y}{d x}+x y=0 \quad \text { } \end{aligned}$

subject: Math
question: $\tan{y} = \frac{2 t}{1 - t^{2}} , \sin{x} = \frac{2 t}{1 + t^{2}} , \frac{dy}{dx} = ?$
explanation: $\begin{array}{l}\sin x=\frac{2 t}{1+t^{2}} \\ \left.\cos x=\frac{\left(1+t^{2}\right)(2)-2 t(0+2 t)}{1+t^{2}}\right. \\ \cos x=\frac{2-2 t^{2}}{\left(1+t^{2}\right)^{2}}=\frac{d y}{d x} \\ \frac{d x}{d t}=\frac{2\left(1-t^{2}\right)}{\left(1+t ^{2})\right.} \times \frac{1+t^{2}}{\sqrt{\left(1+t^{2}\right)^{2}-4 t^{2}}} \\ \frac{d x}{d t}=\frac{2}{1+t^{2}}\end{array}$ $\left\{\begin{array}{l}\tan y=\frac{2 t}{1-t^{2}} \\ \sec ^{2} y\frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{2+2 t^{2}}{\left(1-t^{2}\right)^{2}} \\ \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{2}{1+t^{2}}….\text { (ii) } \\ \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{\frac{2}{1+t^{2}}}{\frac{2}{1+t}}=1\end{array}\right.$

subject: Math
question: $y=secx$ হলে নীচের কোনটি সঠিক?
explanation: $\begin{array}{l}y=\sec x \\ \frac{d}{d x}(y)=\sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{1}=\sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec x \frac{d}{d x}(\tan x)+\tan x \frac{d}{d x}(\sec x) \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec x \sec ^{2} x+\tan x \sec x \tan x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec ^{3} x+\{\sec x(\sec x-1)\} \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=\sec ^{3} x+\sec ^{3} x-\sec x \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=y^{3}+y^{3}-y \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=2 y^{3}-y \\ \Rightarrow y_{2}=y\left(2 y^{2}-1\right)\end{array}$

subject: Math
question: $y=x^2+2x-4$ বক্ররেখার (2, 4) বিন্দুতে অঙ্কিত স্পর্শকের সমীকরণ কোনটি?
explanation: $\begin{array}{l}\frac{d y}{d x}=2 x+2 \\ \left(\frac{d y}{d x}\right)(2,4)=6 \\ \therefore y-4=6(x-2)\end{array}$

subject: Math
question: $f\left(x\right)=x^3-3x$ এর সর্বোচ্চ ও সর্বনিম্ন মান হচ্ছে

subject: Math
question: x এর কোন মানের জন্য $y=x+\frac{1}{x}$ বক্ররেখাটির স্পর্শকের ঢাল শূন্য হবে?

subject: Math
question: y=cos√x হলে dy/dx এর মান কত?

subject: Math
question: y2=4x বক্ররেখাটির (2,2√2) বিন্দুতে tangent এর ঢাল কত?

subject: Math
question: নিচের সীমার মান কোনটি? $\lim _{x \rightarrow a} \frac{x^{7 / 2}-a^{7 / 2}}{\sqrt{x}-\sqrt{a}} \quad$
explanation: $\begin{array}{l} =\frac{\lim _{x \rightarrow a}\left(x^{7 / 2}-a^{7 / 2}\right)}{\lim _{x \rightarrow a}\left(x^{1 / 2}-a^{1 / 2}\right)}=\frac{\lim _{x \rightarrow a} \frac{x^{7 / 2}-a^{7 / 2}}{x-a}}{\lim _{x \rightarrow a} \frac{x^{1 / 2}-a^{1 / 2}}{x-a}} \\ =\frac{\frac{7}{2} a^{\frac{7}{2}-1}}{\frac{1}{2} a^{\frac{1}{2}-1}} \quad\left[\because \lim _{x \rightarrow 7} \frac{x^{n}-a^{n}}{x-a}=n a^{n-1}\right] \\ =\left(\frac{7}{2} \times \frac{2}{1}\right) a^{\frac{7}{2}-1-\frac{1}{2}+1}=7 a^{\frac{7}{2}-\frac{1}{2}}=7 a^{3} \text { (Ans.) } \end{array}$

subject: Math
question: $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\cos 7 x-\cos 9 x}{\cos 3 x-\cos 5 x}=?$
explanation: $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\cos 7 x-\cos 9 x}{\cos 3 x-\cos 5 x}$ $\cos A-\cos B=-2 \sin \left(\frac{A+B}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{A-B}{2}\right)$ $\begin{aligned} \cos 7 x-\cos 9 x & =-2 \sin \left(\frac{7 x+9 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{7 x-9 x}{2}\right) \\ = & -2 \sin \left(\frac{16 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{-2 x}{2}\right) \\ & =-2 \sin (8 x) \sin (-x) \end{aligned}$ $\begin{aligned} = & -2 \sin (8 x) \sin (-x) \\ & =2 \sin (8 x) \sin x \end{aligned}$ $\begin{array}{c} \cos 3 x-\cos 5 x=-2 \sin \left(\frac{3 x+5 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{3 x-5 x}{2}\right) \\ =-2 \sin \left(\frac{8 x}{2}\right) \sin \left(\frac{-2 x}{2}\right) \\ =-2 \sin (4 x) \sin (-x) \\ =2 \sin (4 x) \sin x \end{array}$ $\begin{array}{c} \frac{2 \sin (8 x) \sin x}{2 \sin (4 x) \sin x} \\ =\frac{\sin (8 x)}{\sin (4 x)} \end{array}$ $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\sin (8 x)}{\sin (4 x)}=\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{8 x}{4 x}=2$ $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\cos 7 x-\cos 9 x}{\cos 3 x-\cos 5 x}=2$

subject: Math
question: নিচের সীমার মান কোনটি? $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{a^{x}-a^{-x}}{x}$
explanation: $\begin{aligned} & \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{a^{x}-a^{-x}}{x} \\ = & \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{x}\left[\left\{1+x \ln a+\frac{(x \ln a)^{2}}{2 !}+\frac{(x \ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\cdots\right\}\right. \\ & \left.-\left\{1-x \ln a+\frac{(x \ln a)^{2}}{2 !}-\frac{(x \ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\cdots\right\}\right] \\ = & \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{x}\left\{2 x \ln a+2 \frac{(x \ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\cdots \cdots\right\} \\ = & 2 \lim _{x \rightarrow 0}\left\{\ln a+\frac{x^{2}(\ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\frac{x^{4}(\ln a)^{5}}{5 !}+\cdots\right\} \\ = & 2 \lim _{x \rightarrow 0}\left\{\ln a+\frac{0^{2}(\ln a)^{3}}{3 !}+\frac{0^{4}(\ln a)^{5}}{5 !}+\cdots\right\} \end{aligned}$ $=2 \ln a \text { (Ans.) }$

subject: Math
question: y = x³ ln x হলে $\frac{d^{4} y}{dx^{4}} = ?$
explanation: $\begin{array}{l}y=x^{3} \ln x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{x^{3}}{x}+3 x^{2} \ln x \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=x^{2}+3 x^{2} \ln x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=x^{2}(1+3 \ln x) \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=\frac{x^{2} \cdot 3}{x}+2 x(1+3 \ln x) \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=3 x+2 x(1+3 \ln x) \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=x(3+2+6 \ln x) \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=x(5+6 \ln x) \Rightarrow \frac{d^{3} y}{d x^{3}}=\frac{x \cdot 6}{x}+1 \cdot(5+6 \ln x) \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d^{3} y}{d x^{3}}=6+5+6 \ln x \Rightarrow \frac{d^{4} y}{d x^{4}}=\frac{6}{x}\end{array}$

subject: Math
question: x2+y2=15 বৃত্তের (3,2) বিন্দুতে অবিলম্বের সমীকরণ কোনটি?
explanation: $x^{2}+y^{2}=15$ বৃত্তের (3,2) বিন্দুতে স্পর্শকের সমীকরণ, $3 \mathrm{x}+2 \mathrm{y}=15$ ধরি, অভিলম্বের সমীকরণ, $2 x-3 y=k$ ....... (i) $(3,2)$ বিন্দুগামী হলে, $2.3-3.2=k \Rightarrow k=0$ (i) নং হতে, $2 \mathrm{x}-3 \mathrm{y}=0 \Rightarrow 3 \mathrm{y}-2 \mathrm{x}=0$

subject: Math
question: y = x3 – 2x2 + 3 বক্ররেখার (2, 3) বিন্দুতে অঙ্কিত স্পর্শক এর সমীকরণ নিচের কোনটি?
explanation: $y=x^{3}-2 x^{2}+3 \quad \therefore \frac{d y}{d x}=3 x^{2}-4 x$ এখন $(2,3)$ বিন্দুতে ঢাল $\frac{d y}{d x}=3 \times 2^{2}-4 \times 2=4$ এখন $(2,3)$ বিন্দুতে স্পর্শকের সমীকরণ, $y-3=m(x-2)$ $\Rightarrow y-3=4(x-2) \Rightarrow y-3=4 x-8 \Rightarrow y=4 x-5$

subject: Math
question: 4ex + 9e-x এর ক্ষুদ্রতম মান কত?
explanation: ধরি, $y=4 e^{x}+9 e^{-x}$ . $\begin{array}{l} \therefore \frac{d y}{d x}=4 e^{x}+9 e^{-x} \cdot(-1)=4 e^{x}-9 e^{-x} \\ \therefore \frac{d^{2} y}{d x^{2}}=4 e^{x}+9 e^{-x} \end{array}$ ক্ষুদ্রতম ও বৃহত্তম মানের জন্য, $\frac{d y}{d x}=0$ বা, $4 \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{x}}-9 \mathrm{e}^{-\mathrm{x}}=0$ বা, $4 \mathrm{e}^{\mathrm{x}}=9 \mathrm{e}^{-\mathrm{x}}$ বা, $4 e^{x}=\frac{9}{e^{x}}$ বা, $e^{2 x}=\frac{9}{4}$ বা, $\left(e^{x}\right)^{2}=\left(\frac{3}{2}\right)^{2}$ বা, $e^{x}=\frac{3}{2} \quad \therefore x=\ln \frac{3}{2}$ $\mathrm{x}=\ln \frac{3}{2}$ বিন্দুতে , $\frac{\mathrm{d}^{2} \mathrm{y}}{\mathrm{dx}^{2}}=4 \mathrm{e}^{\ln \frac{3}{2}}+9 \cdot \frac{1}{\mathrm{e}^{\ln \frac{3}{2}}}$ $=4 \times \frac{3}{2}+9 \times \frac{2}{3}\left[\because \mathrm{e}^{l^{\frac{3}{2}}}=\frac{3}{2}\right]$ $=6+6=12>0$ . $\therefore \mathrm{x}=\ln \frac{3}{2}$ বিন্দুতে y এর আপেক্ষিক ক্ষুদ্রতম বিদ্যমান। $\therefore$ আপেক্ষিক ক্ষুদ্রতম মান $=4 \mathrm{e}^{\ln \frac{3}{2}}+9 \cdot \frac{1}{e^{\ln \frac{3}{2}}}$ $\begin{array}{l} =4 \cdot \frac{3}{2}+9 \cdot \frac{2}{3} \\ =6+6=12 \text { (দেখানো হলে ) } \end{array}$

subject: Math
question: $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\tan x-\sin x}{x^{3}}$ এর মান কত?
explanation: $\begin{array}{l}\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\tan x-\sin x}{x^{3}} \\ =\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\tan x}{x} \frac{1-\cos x)}{x^{2}} \\ =\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\tan x}{x} \frac{(1-\cos x)(1+\cos x)}{x^{2}(1+\cos x)} \\ =\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\sin x}{x} \cdot \frac{1}{\cos x} \cdot \frac{1-\cos ^{2} x}{x^{2}(1+\cos x)} \\ =\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\sin x}{x} \cdot \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{\cos x} \cdot\left(\frac{\sin x}{x}\right)^{2} \cdot \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{(1+\cos x)} \\ =1.1 .\left(\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\sin x}{x}\right)^{2}+\frac{1}{2} \\ =\frac{1}{2} \\∴ \lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\tan x-\sin x}{x^{3}}=\frac{1}{2} \\\end{array}$

subject: Math
question: $e^{x y + 1} = 5$ হলে, $\frac{dy}{dx}$ এর মান নিচের কোনটি ?
explanation: $^{}$ দেওয়া আছে, $\mathrm{e}^{x y+1}=5 \Rightarrow \mathrm{xy}+1=\ln 5$ $\therefore \frac{\mathrm{dy}}{\mathrm{dx}}=-\frac{\mathrm{y}}{\mathrm{x}}$ [Using the formula of implicit function]

subject: Math
question: কোন ব্যবধিতে $f\left(x\right)=\frac{x}{x^{2} + 1}$ ক্রমবর্ধমান?
explanation: $\begin{aligned} f(x) & =\frac{x}{x^{2}+1} \\ \Rightarrow f^{\prime}(x) & =\frac{\left(x^{2}+1\right)(1-x) \times 2 x}{\left(x^{2}+1\right)^{2}} \\ & =\frac{1-x^{2}}{\left(x^{2}+1\right)^{2}}\end{aligned}$ ক্রম বর্ধমান ফাংশনের জন্য, $f^{\prime}(x)>0$ $\Rightarrow \frac{1-x^{2}}{\left(x^{2}+1\right)^{2}}>0 \Rightarrow 1-x^{2}>0 \Rightarrow x^{2}-1<0 \\ \Rightarrow|x|^{2}<1 \Rightarrow|x|<1$ $\therefore-1<x<1$ ব্যবধি, $\left(- 1 , 1\right)$

subject: Math
question: নিচের সীমার মান কোনটি? $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{3 \sin x-\sin 3 x}{x^{3}}$

subject: Math
question: $\lim _{x \rightarrow-\infty} \frac{\sqrt{x^{2}+2 x}}{-x}$ এর মান হল
explanation: $\lim _{x \rightarrow-\infty} \frac{\sqrt{x^{2}+2 x}}{-x}=\lim _{x \rightarrow-\infty} \frac{x \sqrt{1+\frac{2}{x}}}{-x}=\lim _{x \rightarrow-\infty}-\sqrt{1+\frac{2}{x}}$ Here, limiting value may seen to be -1 . But, in $\lim _{x \rightarrow-\infty} \frac{\sqrt{x^{2}+2 x}}{-x}, \sqrt{x^{2}+2 x}>0$ $x \rightarrow-\infty \Rightarrow x<0 \Rightarrow-x>0 \therefore \lim _{x \rightarrow-\infty} \frac{\sqrt{x^{2}+2 x}}{-x}=1$

subject: Math
question: $x=1$ বিন্দুতে $f(x)=x^{3}-3 x^{2}$ $+x$ ফাংশনটি ____।
explanation: Solve: দেওয়া আছে, $f(x)=x^{3}-3 x^{2}+x$ $\begin{array}{l} \therefore \quad f^{\prime}(x)=3 \mathrm{x}^{2}-6 \mathrm{x}+1 \\ \therefore f^{\prime}(1)=3 \times 1^{2}-6 \times 1+1=3-6+1 \\ =-2<0 \\ \end{array}$ $\therefore \quad x=1$ বিন্দুতে প্রদত্ত ফাংশনটি হ্রাস পায়।

subject: Math
question: $\frac{d}{dx}\left(x e^{x}\right)^{\sin x}$
explanation: Solve: $\begin{array}{l} \text {Let, } y=\left(x e^{x}\right)^{\sin x} \\ \therefore \ln y=\ln \left(x e^{x}\right)^{\sin x}=\sin x\left(\ln x+\ln e^{x}\right) \\ =\sin x(\ln x+x) \\ \end{array}$ ইহাকে X এর সাপেক্ষে অন্তরীকরণ করে পাই, $\begin{aligned} & \frac{1}{y} \frac{d y}{d x}=\sin x\left(\frac{1}{x}+1\right)+(\ln x+x) \cos x \\ \Rightarrow & \frac{d y}{d x}=y\left[\left(\frac{1}{x}+1\right) \sin x+(\ln x+x) \cos x\right] \\ & =\left(x e^{x}\right)^{\sin x}\left[\sin x \cdot\left(\frac{1}{x}+1\right)+(\ln x+x) \cos x\right] \end{aligned}$

subject: Math
question: y=lnx+cotx-x হলে dy/dx এর মান কত?

subject: Math
question: যদি y = x2 + 1 হয়, তবে কোন বিন্দুতে y এবং dy/dx এর মান সমান হবে?
explanation: $\begin{aligned} & \frac{d y}{d x}=y \\ \Rightarrow & \frac{d\left(x^{2}+1\right)}{d x}=x^{2}+1\end{aligned}$ $\Rightarrow 2 x=x^{2}+1$ $\begin{array}{l} x^{2}-2 x+1=0 \\ \Rightarrow(x-1)^{2}=0 \\ \Rightarrow x=1 \end{array}$ Then, $\begin{aligned} y & =x^{2}+1 \\ & =1+1 \\ & =2 \end{aligned}$

subject: Math
question: $\dfrac { d } { d x } \tan ^ { - 1 } ( \sec x + \tan x )$ = ?
explanation: $\dfrac d{dx} \tan ^{-1} (\sec x+\tan x)$ $\implies \dfrac 1{1+(\sec x+\tan x)^2}\dfrac d{dx}(\sec x+\tan x)$ $\implies \dfrac 1{1+(\sec x+\tan x)^2}(\sec x\tan x+\sec ^2x)$ $\implies \dfrac 1{1+\sec ^2 x+\tan ^2x +2\sec x\tan x}(\sec x\tan x+\sec ^2x)$ $\implies \dfrac 1{2\sec^2x+2\sec x \tan x}(\sec x\tan x+\sec ^2x)$ $\implies \dfrac 12$

subject: Math
question: একটি গোলকের ব্যাসার্ধের বৃদ্ধিহার এবং পৃষ্ঠদেশের বৃদ্ধিহার সংখ্যাসূচক ভাবে সমান হলে, গোলকটির ব্যাসার্ধের মান
explanation: গোলকের ব্যাসার্ধ বৃদ্ধির হার= $\ \frac{d r}{d t}$ পৃষ্ঠদেশের বৃদ্ধির হার $\text { } \begin{aligned} & =\frac{d}{d t}\left(4 \pi r^{2}\right) \\ & =8 \pi r \frac{d r}{d t} \end{aligned}$ প্রশ্নমতে, $\begin{array}{l} 8 \pi r \frac{d r}{d t}=\frac{d r}{d t} \\ \therefore \quad r=\frac{1}{8 \pi} \end{array}$ (Ans)

subject: Math
question: নিচের সীমার মান কোনটি? $\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac {\tan ax}{sin bx}$
explanation: Solve: $\begin{array}{l} =\lim _{x \rightarrow 0} \frac {\tan ax}{sin bx}\\ =\frac {\lim _{ax \rightarrow 0} \frac {\tan ax}{ax}{\times a}}{\lim _{bx \rightarrow 0} \frac {\sin bx}{ bx}{\times b}}\\ =\frac{1 \times a}{1 \times b}=\frac{a}{b} \text { (Ans.) } \\ \end{array}$

subject: Math
question: y=10log(sinx) হলে, $\frac{dy}{dx}$ এর মান কোনটি?
explanation: $\mathrm{y}=10^{\log (\sin \mathrm{x})} \Rightarrow \ln \mathrm{y}=\log (\sin \mathrm{x}) \times \ln 10=\frac{\ln (\sin \mathrm{x})}{\ln 10} \times \ln 10=\ln (\sin \mathrm{x})$ $\Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=y \cdot \frac{1}{\sin x} \cdot \cos x=10^{\log (\sin x)} \cdot \cot x$

subject: Math
question: x = a বিন্দুতে f(x) ক্রমবর্ধমন হবে যদি
explanation: f(x) একটি ফাংশন হলে এবং $f\prime(x)$ হলো x এর সাপেক্ষে f(x) এর অন্তরীকরণ। যদি $f^{\prime}(a)$ =0 হয় তবেই কেবলমাত্র x = a বিন্দুতে f(x) ক্রমবর্ধমান হবে।

subject: Math
question: $\operatorname{Lim}_{x \rightarrow 0} \frac{\sqrt{a + x ²} - \sqrt{a - x ²}}{x^{2}}$ এর মান কত?

subject: Math
question: x এর প্রেক্ষিতে $y = \tan^{- 1}\frac{1 - x}{1 + x}$ এর অন্তরজ কত?
explanation: $\begin{array}{l}y=\tan ^{-1} \frac{1-x}{1+x} \Rightarrow y=\tan ^{-1} 1-\tan ^{-1} x \\ \Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=\frac{d}{d x}\left(\tan ^{-1} 1\right)-\frac{d}{d x}\left(\tan ^{-1} x\right) \\\Rightarrow \frac{d y}{d x}=0-\frac{1}{1+x^{2}}=-\frac{1}{1+x^{2}}\end{array}$
